source_text:
Meeting Notes - Product Sync (Dec 10)

Attendees: Alice, Bob, Carol

Discussion:
- The search feature is still returning irrelevant results. We need to fix the ranking algorithm before the end of the month.
- Carol mentioned that the mobile app crashes on iOS 17 for about 30% of users. This is a P0.
- We should probably set up better monitoring for the API. Current alerts are too noisy.
- Bob will handle the database migration next sprint.
- Need to update the onboarding docs since we changed the signup flow last week.

Action items: TBD
